title: SimpleEnderite
body:
This mod introduces a new way to obtain Enderite Tools and Armor, which are approximately 150% more powerful than their Netherite counterparts.
To obtain Enderite Chips, you can craft chorus fruits and lapis lazuli together.

Using 4 Enderite Chips, 4 Netherite Ingots, and an Eye of Ender, you can craft an Enderite Ingot.

You can then combine the Enderite Ingot with a Molten Netherite piece, obtained by blasting a Netherite item, to craft an Enderite item. (Molten Enderite Tools can´t be used as such [They are only used to upgrade to Enderite])

Additionally, there is an Enderite Block that can be crafted just like any other ore block.

Take a look into the gallery to see more.

If you look it up in JEI dont be confused that it will be shown as ExampleMod (I´m pretty new to modding and just had bugs while trying to fix that)
